class.name: pdz_controller_library/CartesianImpedanceController
class.description: The cartesian impedance controller uses cartesian impedance control to bring the Robot to a desired position and orientation.

class.name: pdz_controller_library/JointImpedanceController
class.description: The joint impedance controller uses joint impedance control to bring the Robot to a desired position and orientation.

class.name: pdz_controller_library/JointImpedanceIkController
class.description: The joint impedance IK controller uses differential inverse kinematics and impedance control for Cartesian end-effector motion.

class.name: pdz_controller_library/RiemannianMotionPolicy
class.description: The riemannian motion policy uses riemannian geometry to plan and execute motion for the Robot.
